title: HealthResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag health` on stdout as a single JSON line. Accepts `--format json`, legacy `--format text`, or `--json` as no-op compatibility flags; JSON is always emitted. Exit codes: 0 success, 1 runtime error, 2 CLI usage error, 4 database not found.

mentions_ratio.description: Fraction of all relationships that are of type 'mentions'. Present when mentions dominate the graph above 50%.

mentions_warning.description: Human-readable warning when mentions_ratio exceeds threshold. Present alongside mentions_ratio.

fts_query_ok.description: True when FTS5 MATCH query succeeds (not just table existence)

sqlite_version.description: Bundled SQLite version from SELECT sqlite_version()

top_relation.description: Relation type with the highest edge count. Present when relation concentration analysis is available.

top_relation_ratio.description: Fraction of all edges occupied by top_relation (0.0-1.0). Present alongside top_relation.

applies_to_ratio.description: Fraction of all edges that are of type 'applies-to'. Present when relation concentration analysis is available.

relation_concentration_warning.description: Human-readable warning when a single relation type dominates the graph. Present when concentration threshold is exceeded.
